subcodes.first_line: O ye who are related to him who ascended unto God! Khalil hath hastened unto the glorious Kingdom, and dwelleth nigh unto His great mercy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منتسبان آن متصاعد الی الله جناب خلیل بملکوت جلیل شتافت و در جوار رحمت کبری
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @soul; spirit after death, @consolation and comfort
